description: A customer has a charge on their bill from a 3rd party service (e.g., a mobile game subscription) they claim they did not authorize.

nodes.task_description: Identify the 3rd party charge on the customer's bill.
Explain the nature of 3rd party billing and how the charge originated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the direct carrier billing process.

nodes.task_description: Provide the contact information for the 3rd party company for the customer to dispute the charge directly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the customer the correct contact info.

nodes.task_description: Apply a block on the account to prevent future 3rd party charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the 3rd party billing block.
